name: mosaic-token-extensions-admin
description: TypeScript SDK, CLI, and UI for managing standard token types on Solana (ex: Stablecoin & Arcade Tokens)

scripts.precommit: pnpm run format && pnpm run lint:fix
scripts.check: pnpm run build && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run type-check

author: Solana Foundation

pnpm._dependencyNotes: These overrides pin the whole workspace onto the Solana Kit v7 ecosystem. @solana-program/token-2022 is the published 0.13.0 (kit-v7-native) — NO patch. token-2022 must be >=0.13.0 on kit v7: 0.12.0's compiled code imports getMinimumBalanceForRentExemption from @solana/kit, which kit v7 removed (0.13.0 no longer uses it). 0.13.0 ships every confidential helper Mosaic consumes EXCEPT confidential mint/burn: transfer/withdraw/configure/apply/empty InstructionPlan helpers, PR #1269 (getConfidentialTransferInstructionPlan resolves the auditor from an optional mintAccount), the owner/mint key derivations, and the subtract/extract ciphertext arithmetic all come from the published /confidential subpath. The mint/burn InstructionPlan helpers (getConfidentialMintInstructionPlan/getConfidentialBurnInstructionPlan) + addWithLoHiCiphertexts do NOT exist in any published token-2022, so they are implemented locally in packages/sdk/src/confidential (mint-burn-plan.ts + mint-burn-proof.ts + ciphertext-math.ts, on @noble/curves + @solana/zk-sdk). This is INTERIM: once the upstream Track A PR merges and a token-2022 release ships the mint/burn helpers, delete the local implementation and re-point mint.ts/burn.ts at @solana-program/token-2022/confidential (a one-line import change each). @solana/token-acl-sdk@0.4.0 declares an exact token-2022 0.12.0 dependency; the override forces it up to 0.13.0 — safe because it only consumes stable core exports (TOKEN_2022_PROGRAM_ADDRESS, getMintDecoder, ATA/metadata helpers, AccountState, Mint), unchanged across 0.10-0.13. @solana/token-acl-sdk / @solana/token-acl-gate-sdk / @solana/connector declare kit <=6 peer ranges but run correctly on kit v7 (they only touch codecs/signers/addresses; the only v7 breaking changes — a type-only codec-union return-type widening, ReactiveStreamStore.connect(), a new instruction-planning error — are not exercised) and are forced onto v7 via the @solana/kit + @solana/* overrides. @solana-program/system and @solana-program/memo are on their kit-v7-native releases (0.13.0 / 0.12.0). See packages/sdk/package.json `_dependencyNotes`. PATCH: token-2022 stays unpatched, but @solana/zk-sdk@0.4.2 IS patched (patches/@solana__zk-sdk@0.4.2.patch) to make its ./bundler subpath condition-aware (node -> CJS node build, else bundler). token-2022@0.13.0's confidential.mjs hardcodes `@solana/zk-sdk/bundler` (ESM+wasm bundler build) which can't load under Node (`Unknown file extension .wasm`) and, if forced, yields a dual-WASM `expected instance of ElGamalKeypair` mismatch; the patch serves the node build under Node while browser bundlers still get the bundler build (they don't set the `node` condition). Mirrors the existing packages/sdk/jest.config.js remap. Remove once @solana/zk-sdk ships a conditional root export upstream (see workspace plan zk-sdk-bundler-wasm-node-resolution.md).
